steps.title: Set up equations from the problem
steps.content:
Let $c$ = correct answers and $i$ = incorrect answers.

From 40 questions total:
$$c + i = 40$$

From score = 2(correct) − (incorrect) = 50:
$$2c - i = 50$$

steps.title: Add equations to eliminate i
steps.content:
Add the equations together to cancel out $i$:
$$c + i + 2c - i = 40 + 50$$
$$3c = 90$$
$$c = 30$$

The player answered 30 questions correctly.
